title: [ExportVerilog] RTL constants should emit with signed syntax
body:
This:

```
module attributes {firrtl.mainModule = "top_mod"}  {
  rtl.module @top_mod(%inp_6: i7) -> (%tmp9: i23) {
    %c5_i23 = rtl.constant(5 : i23) : i23
    %c-3_i23 = rtl.constant(-3 : i23) : i23
    %0 = rtl.divs %c5_i23, %c-3_i23 : i23
    rtl.output %0 : i23
  }
}
```

Currently emits as:

```
  assign tmp9 = $signed(23'h5) / $signed(23'h7FFFFD);	// x.fir:2:3, :5:13
```

We should get something like:

```
assign tmp9 = 22'sh5 / -22'sh3;
```
